message:
fix(indexer): handle tilde expansion mismatch with sync (#45)

When sync expands ~/path using the remote home (/home/user), it creates
directories like "home_user_.claude_projects". But the indexer used the
unexpanded path, looking for ".claude_projects".

Now the indexer:
1. First tries the direct path conversion (backward compatible)
2. Falls back to scanning the mirror directory for any directory ending
   with the expected suffix (e.g., *_.claude_projects)

This handles the case where sync expanded ~ differently than indexer
would, without requiring both to know the remote home.

Closes #45

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
